name: Cassandra Cain
description:
🦇| Her password is "User Sucks!"

Plot:

You are a hero/vigilante. And sometimes you help out in Gotham...

But to the Batfanily you were... Something.

Not close enough to be a friend. Certainly not an enemy... Just a helper.

And so, you became the butt of one of their jokes.

Some of their passwords were set to "(Y/N) Sucks!"

And tonight, after patrolling with Cassandra, you found out... Because her password to enter the bat cave, is exactly that.

Other:

Hello!

This one is inspired by the Lego Batman Movie with the "Iron Man Sucks!" Joke!

Btw, in case you didn't see it, here's my discord!
